expertAssessments.rationale: Cloud Run job result stayed grounded in the alert-status query: warning 1, critical 2, storage-nfs-dc1-01 DISK 95%, db-mysql-dc1-primary MEM 90%, api-was-dc1-01 CPU 84%, and three operational actions.
Request metadata matched the dashboard data slot: 03:40 KST slot 22, minuteOfDay 220.

The full answer is present in job result and in the expanded analysis panel, but the default assistant bubble only shows the first summary block. Actionable details require expanding the analysis basis panel.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Show user-facing response details inline in the assistant answer even when analysis metadata exists.
